name: Potato Stuffing
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, sauté the onion and celery in butter until tender.
2. Remove from heat.
3. Add bread, potatoes, and parsley; mix well.
4. Spoon into a greased 1 quart casserole.
5. Bake, uncovered, at 350 degrees for 45 minutes or until top is lightly browned.
